altText: Goldenrod plumes arching like golden fireworks against blue sky
A goldenrod plume up close — hundreds of tiny golden flowers
A goldenrod plume glowing against dry autumn brush
A tall stand of goldenrod in full September bloom
A goldenrod patch lighting up the edge of a green field
Goldenrod blooming by an old fence in a dry field
Goldenrod's narrow lance-shaped leaves circling the tall stem
Goldenrod leaves along the stem below the golden plumes
The rough, veiny underside of a goldenrod leaf
